summary: SHAEF Air Staff correspondence from March 1945 discusses reports of night phenomena described as balls of fire ('foo fighters') observed by aircrews, including Bomber Command crews reporting similar sightings for some time; the Air Ministry suggests some sightings may have been Me.262 jets and the rest possibly flak rockets, but states no definite explanation could be given. A related memo notes that photographs of 'long cylindrical objects' claimed by a 107th P.R. Squadron pilot were unsuccessful.
